description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master branch with changes in kobo/kernel or .github/workflows/build-kernel.yml, and on pull requests with changes in those paths. The workflow should build the Kobo kernel for glohd and aura2 models using an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the XCSoar/linux repository, caching ccache and downloads, installing dependencies, and uploading the resulting uImage as an artifact.
